title: Mutiny on the Elsinore
writer: Beaufoy Milton, Walter Summers, Jack London
actors: Paul Lukas, Lyn Harding, Kathleen Kelly
plot: The story of a surly crew, an honest God-fearing captain, a hardboiled-but-loyal Scotch mate, a scoundrelly second-mate, and then a mutiny, the fight and the final voyage to a safe harbor. But not before the Captain has been murde...
